data.answer:
I can sense your frustration with the return policy, and I'm here to help you understand it better. 

According to our platform policy (Source 1), for defective or damaged products, the return window is extended to 30 days for non-durable goods and 90 days for durable goods (electronics, appliances, furniture), per CDC Article 26 (Source 2). This means you may be eligible for a refund if your product is damaged or defective.

To initiate the return process, please follow these steps:

1. Contact our customer service team via phone at 866-463-3396 or email at [customer.service@myradiostore.com](mailto:customer.service@myradiostore.com) to report the issue with your product.
2. Provide your order details, including the product description and any relevant photos or videos of the damage.
3. Our customer service team will guide you through the return process and provide a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number.
4. Once you receive the RMA number, please package the product securely and ship it back to us within the extended return window.
5. After we receive the returned product, we will process your refund within 5-10 business days for credit card payments (Source 2).

Please note that you will need to contact our customer service team to initiate the return process. They will be able to assist you further and provide any additional information you may need.

Next step: Contact our customer service team at 866-463-3396 or [customer.service@myradiostore.com](mailto:customer.service@myradiostore.com) to report the issue with your product.

sources.text:
1.4 REFUND ELIGIBILITY CONDITIONS
Full refund is issued when:
- Product is returned within the 7-day window in original condition
- Product arrived defective or damaged
- Product does not match the description or photos
- Order was canceled before shipment
Partial refunds may apply if products show
